review: Hate the new update. All the options that used to pop up when you clicked on NPS (Bank savings, EPF etc) are gone. Those were my favourite portfolio tracking features. The net worth page isn't as clear as those features were. Idk why apps mess with perfection. Also, my EPF account doesn't connect no matter how much I try. Kindly provide manual tracking option for EPF type things so that we can track in some manner at least. And pls provide more clarity on when MF NAV are updated daily. Thanks.
